summary: EXP-407 delivers the WIN-052.c4/c5 horizon-analogy preemption requested by ISS-2026. Three-pronged paragraph inserted into WIN-052.detail_verdict_text between the existing MOND-priority paragraph and the post-hoc-test paragraph: (1) positive-cosmological-claim-not-silence (cites unified-theory CONSISTENT entry + RAR-as-confirmation), (2) mechanism-emptiness (horizons presuppose Hubble flow, which the dome rejects), (3) same-parameter-double-duty (firmament_height=9,086 km invoked as hard ELF reflector in WIN-029 and hard magnetic cap in WIN-053). Pre-flight unique-substring locator confirmed (1 occurrence in detail_verdict_text, 1 in entire wins.json). Append-only patch — current_text preserved verbatim, new paragraph appended via \n\n. review_class=deep-attack (singleton; three new arguments). Closes ISS-2026 on integration. Tracker entry EXP-407 added (orphan-pickup; PROP-029 safety net fired — separate attention-inbox notice authored for tinker). [renumber-note: originally drafted as EXP-406 in this run, renamed to EXP-407 mid-run due to FUSE-collision with EXP-406-SEC-4.2.2 authored 20:11:58.635Z by another analyst-opus run that hadn't pushed to git by run-start]
